name: Potential Malicious MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
notes: This rule detects the Installation of a Exchange Transport Agent
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation, BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Registration
TD_list: APPLY Potential Malicious MSExchange Transport Agent Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation, BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Registration
RED_list: Event name: Potential Malicious MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
Event description: This rule detects the Installation of a Exchange Transport Agent
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
